d(d)
	build_srcz1build sources from SWIG, F2PY files or a function)
build-src=r
directory to "build" sources to)
f2py-opts=Nz!list of f2py command line options)
swig=Nz
path to the SWIG executable)
swig-opts=Nz!list of SWIG command line options)
swig-cppNzAmake SWIG create C++ files (default is autodetected from sources))
f2pyflags=Nz3additional flags to f2py (use --f2py-opts= instead))
swigflags=Nz3additional flags to swig (use --swig-opts= instead))
force
fz2forcibly build everything (ignore file timestamps))
inplace
iziignore build-lib and put compiled extensions into the source directory alongside your pure Python modules)
verbose-cfgNzJchange logging level from WARN to INFO which will show all compiler output)
extensions
package
py_modules
py_modules_dictr"

ext_namer
build_src.pyrex_sourcesc
Pyrex is not supported, but some projects monkeypatch this method.
        That allows compiling Cython code, see gh-6955.
        This method will remain here for compatibility reasons.
        r
